mrp_clause_text: "Reference Bill" For each year of the Agreement, the average of the electric utility bill or bills for UL for the consecutive 12 month period immediately prior to the commencement of such year;
notes: This is a definition clause for 'Reference Bill' rather than a complete MRP formula. It references the average of UL's electric utility bills over a 12-month period prior to each agreement year. The specific components included/excluded and currency are not specified in this excerpt.
